stemHtml: In order to determine DA/DH, the factors taken into account are...

options.a: the OCA/H based on the highest obstacle in the approach or missed approach paths including an allowance for aircraft speed and height loss on any go-around, plus a margin for operational factors.
options.b: the OCA/H based on the highest obstacle in the final approach path including an allowance for aircraft speed plus a margin.
options.c: the OCA/H based on the highest obstacle in the final approach path only, plus a margin for height loss on any go-around.
options.d: the OCA/H based on the highest obstacle in the missed approach path only plus an allowance for height loss on any go-around.
